description: Tier 1 gate verdict FAIL (a required field is missing at the requested mode) fails fast: the behavioral tier never runs, so t3 is forced to SKIPPED. Even with a GREEN static production gate, the structural-floor miss yields final FAIL.
why: § 5 R3 fail-fast (structural floor unmet) + § 6 R7 (t1=FAIL disjunct). The decision-table row (FAIL, any, SKIPPED) -> FAIL.
